title: poa zeae
intro: Poa zeae, also known as bluegrass, is a perennial grass species native to the temperate regions of the Northern Hemisphere. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Poa zeae include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Poa zeae can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
